creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks! There was a typo, GUPS -> CUPS and it's best to have this 

if (defined(WITH_CUPS) || exists(${LOCALBASE}/lib/libcups.so)) && !defined(WITHOUT_CUPS) 

than this: 

.if defined(WITH_CUPS) || (exists(${LOCALBASE}/lib/libcups.so) && !defined(WITHOUT_CUPS))
